title: MCLint Configuration
description: Configurable linting rules for a Minecraft Bedrock project (`.mclint` file). Each rule can be set to "off", "warn", or "error", optionally with rule-specific options as an array.

rules.description: A map of lint rule IDs to their severity and optional configuration options.

identity.format.description:
Validates that identifiers follow the `namespace:name` format (e.g. `myns:my_entity`). Identifiers that do not contain a colon separator are flagged.

**Diagnostic code:** `lint.identity.format`

namespace.allow.description:
Restricts identifiers to a specific set of allowed namespaces. Any identifier whose namespace is **not** in the provided list is flagged.

**Options:** `[severity, [allowedNamespace1, allowedNamespace2, ...]]`

**Diagnostic code:** `lint.namespace.allow`

namespace.deny.description:
Rejects identifiers whose namespace is in the provided deny list.

**Options:** `[severity, [deniedNamespace1, deniedNamespace2, ...]]`

**Diagnostic code:** `lint.namespace.deny`

animation.naming.description:
Validates animation IDs against a regular expression pattern.

**Options:** `[severity, "regexPattern"]`

**Example:** `["warn", "^animation\\.myns\\."]`

**Diagnostic code:** `lint.animation.naming`

animation-state.naming.description:
Validates animation controller state IDs against a regular expression pattern.

**Options:** `[severity, "regexPattern"]`

**Example:** `["warn", "^[a-z_]+$"]`

**Diagnostic code:** `lint.animation-state.naming`

bone.naming.description:
Validates bone names in animations against a regular expression pattern.

**Options:** `[severity, "regexPattern"]`

**Example:** `["warn", "^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$"]`

**Diagnostic code:** `lint.bone.naming`

molang.variable.naming.description:
Validates MoLang variable names (`v.*`, `variable.*`, `t.*`, `temp.*`) against a regular expression pattern. The pattern is tested against the variable name portion only (the part after the scope prefix).

**Options:** `[severity, "regexPattern"]`

**Example:** `["warn", "^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$"]`

**Diagnostic code:** `lint.molang.variable.naming`

severity.description: The severity of a lint rule violation.

oneOf.description: off — rule disabled; warn — shown as a warning; error — shown as an error.

ruleValue.description: A lint rule value: either a plain severity or an array starting with a severity followed by rule-specific options.

ruleWithoutOptions.description: A lint rule that takes no extra options — only a severity value.

ruleWithPatternOption.description: A lint rule that takes an optional regex pattern as its first option.

items.description: A JavaScript-compatible regular expression pattern to test names against. Violations are reported when the name does NOT match.

ruleWithStringArrayOption.description: A lint rule that takes an optional array of strings (e.g. allowed or denied namespace names) as its first option.

items.description: The list of namespace strings to allow or deny.
A namespace name (the portion before the `:` in `namespace:name` identifiers).
